rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.1122, which governs departmental approval of homeless camping site designations by political subdivisions.
quote: Sec. 2306.1122. APPROVAL REQUIRED. (a) A political subdivision may not designate a property to be used by homeless individuals to camp unless the department approves a plan described by Section 2306.1123(b).
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an entirely different subject area from the proposed change.
